title: Inference, Annotations, Literals, and Widening · Compiler Case: Satisfies Operator
summary: Model service categories, thresholds, identifiers, and configuration without widening away domain meaning. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts satisfies operator increment in a literal-safe service configuration model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use satisfies to check a value against a contract while retaining useful inferred literal information.
Control literal widening with const bindings, readonly context, const assertions, and const type parameters.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
